name: Savola Group Company
summary: Savola Group Company, through its subsidiaries, manufactures and distributes food products in the Middle East, North Africa, and Turkey region. The company operates through five segments: Food Processing, Retail, Food Services, Frozen Foods, and Investments. It offers edible oils, vegetable oils, sugar, pasta, bakery products, specialty fats, seafood, confectionery, and frozen food products. The company also engages in the agro cultivation, services and maintenance, trading and distribution, and real estate related investment activities. In addition, it retails groceries through a chain of hypermarkets, supermarkets, and convenience stores. The company was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Jeddah, the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
